not_covered.title: Damage due to unauthorized repair
not_covered.description: Customer's iPhone experienced display malfunction after an unauthorized third-party repair attempt.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to service performed by anyone who is not a representative of Apple or an Apple Authorized Service Provider.

not_covered.reasoning: The damage resulted from unauthorized service not performed by Apple or an AASP, rendering the claim invalid under exclusion 4.2(ii)(d). No service fee applies as coverage is denied.

not_covered.title: Damage from intentional reckless conduct
not_covered.description: Customer intentionally exposed the iPhone to extreme heat causing screen and battery damage.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to damage caused by abuse, misuse, fire, earthquake or other external causes except as described in section 3.2.

not_covered.reasoning: The damage resulted from intentional reckless conduct (extreme heat exposure), which qualifies as misuse and is excluded under section 4.2(ii)(b). Therefore, the claim is not covered, no service fee applies, and it does not count toward the ADH limit.
